commander.name: Commander
commander.tagline: Driven to achieve goals through determination and high standards
commander.core_wound: Confuses control with care; equates softness with weakness
commander.description: Commanders are driven to achieve goals through determination and holding themselves and others to high standards of performance.

shaper.name: Shaper
shaper.tagline: Visualizes ambitious goals and pushes through relentlessly
shaper.core_wound: Self-worth is entirely fused with the magnitude of their output
shaper.description: Shapers visualize ambitious goals and push through obstacles with relentless drive, measuring themselves by the scale of what they build.

quietleader.name: Quiet Leader
quietleader.core_wound: Carries enormous internal clarity that almost never gets spoken aloud
quietleader.description: Quiet Leaders lead through open-mindedness and equanimity, guiding others with calm presence rather than forceful direction.

inspirer.name: Inspirer
inspirer.tagline: Motivates people to get behind challenging ideas
inspirer.core_wound: Believes in the vision so hard they forget to check if others actually followed
inspirer.description: Inspirers motivate people to get behind challenging ideas, carrying conviction that can outpace the room's actual commitment.

campaigner.tagline: Rallies others around ideas and achieves practical results
campaigner.core_wound: Momentum becomes identity; stopping feels like dying

impresario.core_wound: Confuses the quality of the experience they create with the quality of their own worth

inventor.name: Inventor

thinker.tagline: Takes an abstract, philosophical approach to problems
thinker.core_wound: Living in the mind as a way of avoiding the body and its inconvenient demands
